articles.summary: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he is the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling the D.C. crowd and finishing with 12 points in a 122-112 loss to the Jazz.

articles.title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.original_title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.summary: Cooper Flagg returned to the Dallas Mavericks' lineup Thursday night after missing eight games because of a left midfoot sprain and had 18 points and six assists in a 115-114 loss to the Orlando Magic.

articles.title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.original_title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.summary: Deandre Ayton left Thursday night's loss to the Nuggets with a knee injury, while LeBron James complained of a sore elbow afterward and said he wasn't sure of his status for Friday's game against the Pacers.
